metadata.name: Diagnose Nutrient Deficiency from Leaf Image

description: A farmer uploads a picture of a soybean leaf that is yellowing. The agent must diagnose the nutrient deficiency.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the image of the leaf, noting the pattern of chlorosis (yellowing).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies interveinal chlorosis on the upper leaves.

nodes.task_description: Based on the visual symptoms, diagnose the most likely nutrient deficiency.

expected_outcome.value: Agent diagnoses a likely Iron (Fe) deficiency.

nodes.task_description: Recommend a foliar fertilizer application to correct the deficiency and suggest a soil test to confirm the diagnosis.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends a specific chelated iron fertilizer and advises on soil sampling.
